name: Dagbani
notes: STUB: the grapheme inventory of Dagbani is NOT yet specified (graphemes/allophones are empty). Dagbani (Dagbanli) is a Gur (Atlantic-Congo) language of northern Ghana, written in the Latin script with Africa-Alphabet letters (ɛ ɔ ŋ ʒ) and digraphs; it is tonal, and tone is not marked in ordinary orthography.
